name: Methodology question
about: Questions about how gates, work units, or the gate-cycle process work
labels: question

## What are you trying to understand?

<!-- Describe the concept, term, or behaviour you are confused about.
     e.g. "What is the difference between a gate and a work unit?"
          "Why does the driver commit one commit per WU instead of squashing at the end?"
          "When should I use status: blocked vs status: complete?" -->

## Where did you look first?

<!-- Point us at the docs or code you already read so we do not send you back there. -->
- [ ] `docs/methodology.md`
- [ ] `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] `.specfuse/rules/`
- [ ] `.specfuse/features/` (existing feature exemplars)

## What is your best current understanding?

<!-- Your working hypothesis — even if you think it is wrong, it helps us give a
     targeted answer rather than a broad overview. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Paste relevant snippet, error message, or link to the specific WU / gate. -->
